hooks.command: bash -c 'INPUT="$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT"; if echo "$INPUT" | grep -qiE "(DELETE|delete|\.delete\(|method.*DELETE).*(close\.com|airtable\.com|api\.close|api\.airtable)" || echo "$INPUT" | grep -qiE "(close\.com|airtable\.com|api\.close|api\.airtable).*(DELETE|delete|\.delete\(|method.*DELETE)"; then echo "BLOCKED: DELETE-Requests an Close.com oder Airtable sind verboten. Siehe CLAUDE.md." >&2; exit 2; fi'
